title: dioscorea buchananii subsp. undatiloba
intro: Dioscorea buchananii subsp. undatiloba is a subspecies of the Dioscorea buchananii plant, a type of yam that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to enhance testosterone levels and improve fertility in both men and women. The health benefits of Dioscorea buchananii subsp. undatiloba include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and enhancing physical performance, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Dioscorea buchananii subsp. undatiloba can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, or as a decoction made by steeping the root in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea.
